subcodes.title: Words to two Zoroastrian pilgrims, spoken on 1914-05-31
subcodes.first_line: It is a mathematical impossibility that a soul may comprehend the purport of the Teachings of Baha-ollah and then arise to oppose them.
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God as divine physician, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @light and darkness
